system.description: Kenjutsu is a style from Japan that uses a katana wielded in two hands. It would be exceptionally rare in a campaign set in Europe but could potentially have been brought by a traveler. Kenjutsu focuses on speed and timing one’s strikes to defeat one’s opponent.

benefit.description: You get +1 to Initiative Rolls and do +1 damage when wielding a katana in two hands.
benefit.name: Great Speed

finalSecret.description: You spin with your blade in a whirling frenzy. You may spend a Fortune Point to make a free Bladework attack at -2 to hit, even if you have no remaining actions.
finalSecret.name: Steel Whirlwind
